form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 7th in a OPEN on March 31 over 380m at this track behind Emgrand Drive beaten 8 lengths (22.28). Has run blistering time here with a 28.45 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 1.3 lengths third but did clock a swift 28.80 over the 498m journey. Rates a top chance with a repeat here.
